artifacts.title: Example HR - Platinum Sponsor | HR Tech Conference 2026
artifacts.raw_text: Example HR returns as a Platinum Sponsor of HR Tech Conference 2026. Visit booth #412 for a live demo of the all-in-one workforce platform. Example HR's VP of Product will deliver a keynote, 'Unifying HR, payroll, and IT', on the main stage Wednesday.
artifacts.normalized_text: Example HR returns as a Platinum Sponsor of HR Tech Conference 2026. Visit booth #412 for a live demo of the all-in-one workforce platform. Example HR's VP of Product will deliver a keynote, 'Unifying HR, payroll, and IT', on the main stage Wednesday.

metadata.exa_query: "Example HR" sponsor OR exhibitor OR speaker OR booth OR keynote OR webinar conference
